titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale University Library Personnel Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

conventiondeclaration.abbr: finding aid created in accordance with manuscripts and archives' processing manual.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday September 3, 2018 at 09:31

did.abstract: The records consist of personnel files of former employees maintained by Library Human Resources, Yale University.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 32-H (YRG 32-H), Yale University Library personnel records.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale University Library Personnel Records (RU 100). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of personnel files of former employees maintained by Library Human Resources, Yale University.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No online inventory available. Paper inventory available in repository.

did.unittitle: Personnel files, promotion review and grievance records
